Who I Am
About Me
A driven AI enthusiast turning curiosity into capability — one model at a time.
81%
HSC Score

Hi, I'm R. Siva — an AI enthusiast from Chennai with a deep passion for Large Language Models (LLMs), Natural Language Processing, and Generative AI.

Currently in my second year of B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, I'm continuously learning and building expertise in state-of-the-art ML frameworks.

I believe in learning by doing — exploring Hugging Face models, building NLP pipelines, and diving deep into prompt engineering.

🎓B.Tech AI & Data Science — Thangavelu Engineering College
🤖Specializing in LLMs, NLP & Generative AI
📍Chennai, Tamil Nadu — open to remote work
🌱Continuous learner with a growth mindset
